The project management life cycle in software project management includes five key phases: ==**Initiation** (defining scope and feasibility), **Planning** (creating roadmaps and budgeting), **Execution** (developing the software), **Monitoring and Controlling** (tracking progress and risks), and **Closing** (finalizing and delivering the product)==. These phases ensure organized development and quality outcomes. 

note eta management ko kura aaucha so people haru snaga include hune stuff haru lekhna parcha like communication, QA etc. 

![[Pasted image 20260324074707.png]]

1. Project Initiation

The goal is to define the project at a high level and obtain authorization. 

- **[Developing a Business Case](https://www.google.com/search?q=Developing+a+Business+Case&sca_esv=254a162cfe8c6052&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4euy5gmmnXy3sOMyKB4llUSlim4g%3A1774317594008&ei=GvDBaa8Sy56x4w-3xe35BQ&ved=2ahUKEwiY1vSkuLeTAxXlVmwGHZ6XI0sQgK4QegQIBBAB&uact=5&oq=what+are+the+activities+performed+in+Project+management+life+cycle+in+software+project+management+&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp):** Justifying the need for the software project.
- **[Feasibility Study](https://www.google.com/search?q=Feasibility+Study&sca_esv=254a162cfe8c6052&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4euy5gmmnXy3sOMyKB4llUSlim4g%3A1774317594008&ei=GvDBaa8Sy56x4w-3xe35BQ&ved=2ahUKEwiY1vSkuLeTAxXlVmwGHZ6XI0sQgK4QegQIBBAD&uact=5&oq=what+are+the+activities+performed+in+Project+management+life+cycle+in+software+project+management+&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp):** Determining if the project is feasible within technical and financial constraints.
- **[Creating Project Charter](https://www.google.com/search?q=Creating+Project+Charter&sca_esv=254a162cfe8c6052&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4euy5gmmnXy3sOMyKB4llUSlim4g%3A1774317594008&ei=GvDBaa8Sy56x4w-3xe35BQ&ved=2ahUKEwiY1vSkuLeTAxXlVmwGHZ6XI0sQgK4QegQIBBAF&uact=5&oq=what+are+the+activities+performed+in+Project+management+life+cycle+in+software+project+management+&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp):** Defining scope, goals, and assigning a project manager.
- **[Identifying Stakeholders](https://www.google.com/search?q=Identifying+Stakeholders&sca_esv=254a162cfe8c6052&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4euy5gmmnXy3sOMyKB4llUSlim4g%3A1774317594008&ei=GvDBaa8Sy56x4w-3xe35BQ&ved=2ahUKEwiY1vSkuLeTAxXlVmwGHZ6XI0sQgK4QegQIBBAH&uact=5&oq=what+are+the+activities+performed+in+Project+management+life+cycle+in+software+project+management+&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp):** Identifying individuals or groups affected by the project. 

2. Project Planning

This phase creates the roadmap to guide the team. 

- **[Defining Scope and Requirements](https://www.google.com/search?q=Defining+Scope+and+Requirements&sca_esv=254a162cfe8c6052&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4euy5gmmnXy3sOMyKB4llUSlim4g%3A1774317594008&ei=GvDBaa8Sy56x4w-3xe35BQ&ved=2ahUKEwiY1vSkuLeTAxXlVmwGHZ6XI0sQgK4QegQIBxAB&uact=5&oq=what+are+the+activities+performed+in+Project+management+life+cycle+in+software+project+management+&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp):** Detailing the technical specifications, features, and requirements.
- **[Creating Project Schedule](https://www.google.com/search?q=Creating+Project+Schedule&sca_esv=254a162cfe8c6052&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4euy5gmmnXy3sOMyKB4llUSlim4g%3A1774317594008&ei=GvDBaa8Sy56x4w-3xe35BQ&ved=2ahUKEwiY1vSkuLeTAxXlVmwGHZ6XI0sQgK4QegQIBxAD&uact=5&oq=what+are+the+activities+performed+in+Project+management+life+cycle+in+software+project+management+&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp):** Developing a Work Breakdown Structure (WBS), milestones, and timeline.
- **[Budgeting](https://www.google.com/search?q=Budgeting&sca_esv=254a162cfe8c6052&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4euy5gmmnXy3sOMyKB4llUSlim4g%3A1774317594008&ei=GvDBaa8Sy56x4w-3xe35BQ&ved=2ahUKEwiY1vSkuLeTAxXlVmwGHZ6XI0sQgK4QegQIBxAF&uact=5&oq=what+are+the+activities+performed+in+Project+management+life+cycle+in+software+project+management+&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp):** Estimating costs and setting a budget.
- **[Resource Allocation](https://www.google.com/search?q=Resource+Allocation&sca_esv=254a162cfe8c6052&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4euy5gmmnXy3sOMyKB4llUSlim4g%3A1774317594008&ei=GvDBaa8Sy56x4w-3xe35BQ&ved=2ahUKEwiY1vSkuLeTAxXlVmwGHZ6XI0sQgK4QegQIBxAH&uact=5&oq=what+are+the+activities+performed+in+Project+management+life+cycle+in+software+project+management+&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp):** Specifying human, material, and technical resources.
- **[Risk Planning](https://www.google.com/search?q=Risk+Planning&sca_esv=254a162cfe8c6052&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4euy5gmmnXy3sOMyKB4llUSlim4g%3A1774317594008&ei=GvDBaa8Sy56x4w-3xe35BQ&ved=2ahUKEwiY1vSkuLeTAxXlVmwGHZ6XI0sQgK4QegQIBxAJ&uact=5&oq=what+are+the+activities+performed+in+Project+management+life+cycle+in+software+project+management+&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp):** Identifying potential risks and preparing mitigation strategies. 

3. Project Execution

The team performs the work planned to create the deliverables. 

- **[Team Management](https://www.google.com/search?q=Team+Management&sca_esv=254a162cfe8c6052&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4euy5gmmnXy3sOMyKB4llUSlim4g%3A1774317594008&ei=GvDBaa8Sy56x4w-3xe35BQ&ved=2ahUKEwiY1vSkuLeTAxXlVmwGHZ6XI0sQgK4QegQICxAB&uact=5&oq=what+are+the+activities+performed+in+Project+management+life+cycle+in+software+project+management+&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfD79VEJjq7g80dwdN1xRYU8RXPYR67lwCWhMG9QRvufSM0wmu4gUZIGr5fKpZHvMsx4pL3josdRQ-NzpIC8pu10c9qmlT8F4kMXsNAhrPlvJIxO_3eG_XAqRjJ870gh8bUkdjn8H6DIIgpD566Pas4nA6DGyS61pMViJeJLucbJXALELaekEwd5iBHxLBOfCbei9Ag5i8acUrRcYm70o6azts8JMZ2eC8xR1Y0C-Yh6K-OdntO6PZPf9LFxdu-Hqos8t8WLyOn3GPVdjR8sa0iv&csui=3):** Assembling, training, and guiding the project team.
- **[Developing Software](https://www.google.com/search?q=Developing+Software&sca_esv=254a162cfe8c6052&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4euy5gmmnXy3sOMyKB4llUSlim4g%3A1774317594008&ei=GvDBaa8Sy56x4w-3xe35BQ&ved=2ahUKEwiY1vSkuLeTAxXlVmwGHZ6XI0sQgK4QegQICxAD&uact=5&oq=what+are+the+activities+performed+in+Project+management+life+cycle+in+software+project+management+&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfD79VEJjq7g80dwdN1xRYU8RXPYR67lwCWhMG9QRvufSM0wmu4gUZIGr5fKpZHvMsx4pL3josdRQ-NzpIC8pu10c9qmlT8F4kMXsNAhrPlvJIxO_3eG_XAqRjJ870gh8bUkdjn8H6DIIgpD566Pas4nA6DGyS61pMViJeJLucbJXALELaekEwd5iBHxLBOfCbei9Ag5i8acUrRcYm70o6azts8JMZ2eC8xR1Y0C-Yh6K-OdntO6PZPf9LFxdu-Hqos8t8WLyOn3GPVdjR8sa0iv&csui=3):** Designing, coding, and documenting the software.
- **[Quality Management](https://www.google.com/search?q=Quality+Management&sca_esv=254a162cfe8c6052&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4euy5gmmnXy3sOMyKB4llUSlim4g%3A1774317594008&ei=GvDBaa8Sy56x4w-3xe35BQ&ved=2ahUKEwiY1vSkuLeTAxXlVmwGHZ6XI0sQgK4QegQICxAF&uact=5&oq=what+are+the+activities+performed+in+Project+management+life+cycle+in+software+project+management+&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfD79VEJjq7g80dwdN1xRYU8RXPYR67lwCWhMG9QRvufSM0wmu4gUZIGr5fKpZHvMsx4pL3josdRQ-NzpIC8pu10c9qmlT8F4kMXsNAhrPlvJIxO_3eG_XAqRjJ870gh8bUkdjn8H6DIIgpD566Pas4nA6DGyS61pMViJeJLucbJXALELaekEwd5iBHxLBOfCbei9Ag5i8acUrRcYm70o6azts8JMZ2eC8xR1Y0C-Yh6K-OdntO6PZPf9LFxdu-Hqos8t8WLyOn3GPVdjR8sa0iv&csui=3):** Implementing quality standards and ensuring compliance.
- **[Communication Management](https://www.google.com/search?q=Communication+Management&sca_esv=254a162cfe8c6052&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4euy5gmmnXy3sOMyKB4llUSlim4g%3A1774317594008&ei=GvDBaa8Sy56x4w-3xe35BQ&ved=2ahUKEwiY1vSkuLeTAxXlVmwGHZ6XI0sQgK4QegQICxAH&uact=5&oq=what+are+the+activities+performed+in+Project+management+life+cycle+in+software+project+management+&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfD79VEJjq7g80dwdN1xRYU8RXPYR67lwCWhMG9QRvufSM0wmu4gUZIGr5fKpZHvMsx4pL3josdRQ-NzpIC8pu10c9qmlT8F4kMXsNAhrPlvJIxO_3eG_XAqRjJ870gh8bUkdjn8H6DIIgpD566Pas4nA6DGyS61pMViJeJLucbJXALELaekEwd5iBHxLBOfCbei9Ag5i8acUrRcYm70o6azts8JMZ2eC8xR1Y0C-Yh6K-OdntO6PZPf9LFxdu-Hqos8t8WLyOn3GPVdjR8sa0iv&csui=3):** Conducting status meetings and communicating with stakeholders. !

4. Monitoring and Controlling

This phase happens concurrently with execution to ensure the project stays on track. !

- **[Tracking Performance](https://www.google.com/search?q=Tracking+Performance&sca_esv=254a162cfe8c6052&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4euy5gmmnXy3sOMyKB4llUSlim4g%3A1774317594008&ei=GvDBaa8Sy56x4w-3xe35BQ&ved=2ahUKEwiY1vSkuLeTAxXlVmwGHZ6XI0sQgK4QegQIDhAB&uact=5&oq=what+are+the+activities+performed+in+Project+management+life+cycle+in+software+project+management+&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfD79VEJjq7g80dwdN1xRYU8RXPYR67lwCWhMG9QRvufSM0wmu4gUZIGr5fKpZHvMsx4pL3josdRQ-NzpIC8pu10c9qmlT8F4kMXsNAhrPlvJIxO_3eG_XAqRjJ870gh8bUkdjn8H6DIIgpD566Pas4nA6DGyS61pMViJeJLucbJXALELaekEwd5iBHxLBOfCbei9Ag5i8acUrRcYm70o6azts8JMZ2eC8xR1Y0C-Yh6K-OdntO6PZPf9LFxdu-Hqos8t8WLyOn3GPVdjR8sa0iv&csui=3):** Measuring project performance against the project management plan.
- **[Change Management](https://www.google.com/search?q=Change+Management&sca_esv=254a162cfe8c6052&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4euy5gmmnXy3sOMyKB4llUSlim4g%3A1774317594008&ei=GvDBaa8Sy56x4w-3xe35BQ&ved=2ahUKEwiY1vSkuLeTAxXlVmwGHZ6XI0sQgK4QegQIDhAD&uact=5&oq=what+are+the+activities+performed+in+Project+management+life+cycle+in+software+project+management+&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfD79VEJjq7g80dwdN1xRYU8RXPYR67lwCWhMG9QRvufSM0wmu4gUZIGr5fKpZHvMsx4pL3josdRQ-NzpIC8pu10c9qmlT8F4kMXsNAhrPlvJIxO_3eG_XAqRjJ870gh8bUkdjn8H6DIIgpD566Pas4nA6DGyS61pMViJeJLucbJXALELaekEwd5iBHxLBOfCbei9Ag5i8acUrRcYm70o6azts8JMZ2eC8xR1Y0C-Yh6K-OdntO6PZPf9LFxdu-Hqos8t8WLyOn3GPVdjR8sa0iv&csui=3):** Evaluating, documenting, and approving or rejecting changes to project scope.
- **[Risk Mitigation](https://www.google.com/search?q=Risk+Mitigation&sca_esv=254a162cfe8c6052&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4euy5gmmnXy3sOMyKB4llUSlim4g%3A1774317594008&ei=GvDBaa8Sy56x4w-3xe35BQ&ved=2ahUKEwiY1vSkuLeTAxXlVmwGHZ6XI0sQgK4QegQIDhAF&uact=5&oq=what+are+the+activities+performed+in+Project+management+life+cycle+in+software+project+management+&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfD79VEJjq7g80dwdN1xRYU8RXPYR67lwCWhMG9QRvufSM0wmu4gUZIGr5fKpZHvMsx4pL3josdRQ-NzpIC8pu10c9qmlT8F4kMXsNAhrPlvJIxO_3eG_XAqRjJ870gh8bUkdjn8H6DIIgpD566Pas4nA6DGyS61pMViJeJLucbJXALELaekEwd5iBHxLBOfCbei9Ag5i8acUrRcYm70o6azts8JMZ2eC8xR1Y0C-Yh6K-OdntO6PZPf9LFxdu-Hqos8t8WLyOn3GPVdjR8sa0iv&csui=3):** Addressing risks that materialize during the project.
- **[Quality Control](https://www.google.com/search?q=Quality+Control&sca_esv=254a162cfe8c6052&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4euy5gmmnXy3sOMyKB4llUSlim4g%3A1774317594008&ei=GvDBaa8Sy56x4w-3xe35BQ&ved=2ahUKEwiY1vSkuLeTAxXlVmwGHZ6XI0sQgK4QegQIDhAH&uact=5&oq=what+are+the+activities+performed+in+Project+management+life+cycle+in+software+project+management+&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfD79VEJjq7g80dwdN1xRYU8RXPYR67lwCWhMG9QRvufSM0wmu4gUZIGr5fKpZHvMsx4pL3josdRQ-NzpIC8pu10c9qmlT8F4kMXsNAhrPlvJIxO_3eG_XAqRjJ870gh8bUkdjn8H6DIIgpD566Pas4nA6DGyS61pMViJeJLucbJXALELaekEwd5iBHxLBOfCbei9Ag5i8acUrRcYm70o6azts8JMZ2eC8xR1Y0C-Yh6K-OdntO6PZPf9LFxdu-Hqos8t8WLyOn3GPVdjR8sa0iv&csui=3):** Testing and validating deliverables (e.g., testing in software). 

5. Project Closing
Formalizing the completion of the project. 
- **[Final Deliverable Handover](https://www.google.com/search?q=Final+Deliverable+Handover&sca_esv=254a162cfe8c6052&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4euy5gmmnXy3sOMyKB4llUSlim4g%3A1774317594008&ei=GvDBaa8Sy56x4w-3xe35BQ&ved=2ahUKEwiY1vSkuLeTAxXlVmwGHZ6XI0sQgK4QegQIERAB&uact=5&oq=what+are+the+activities+performed+in+Project+management+life+cycle+in+software+project+management+&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfD79VEJjq7g80dwdN1xRYU8RXPYR67lwCWhMG9QRvufSM0wmu4gUZIGr5fKpZHvMsx4pL3josdRQ-NzpIC8pu10c9qmlT8F4kMXsNAhrPlvJIxO_3eG_XAqRjJ870gh8bUkdjn8H6DIIgpD566Pas4nA6DGyS61pMViJeJLucbJXALELaekEwd5iBHxLBOfCbei9Ag5i8acUrRcYm70o6azts8JMZ2eC8xR1Y0C-Yh6K-OdntO6PZPf9LFxdu-Hqos8t8WLyOn3GPVdjR8sa0iv&csui=3):** Delivering the software to the client or operations team.
- **[Post-Mortem Analysis](https://www.google.com/search?q=Post-Mortem+Analysis&sca_esv=254a162cfe8c6052&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4euy5gmmnXy3sOMyKB4llUSlim4g%3A1774317594008&ei=GvDBaa8Sy56x4w-3xe35BQ&ved=2ahUKEwiY1vSkuLeTAxXlVmwGHZ6XI0sQgK4QegQIERAD&uact=5&oq=what+are+the+activities+performed+in+Project+management+life+cycle+in+software+project+management+&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfD79VEJjq7g80dwdN1xRYU8RXPYR67lwCWhMG9QRvufSM0wmu4gUZIGr5fKpZHvMsx4pL3josdRQ-NzpIC8pu10c9qmlT8F4kMXsNAhrPlvJIxO_3eG_XAqRjJ870gh8bUkdjn8H6DIIgpD566Pas4nA6DGyS61pMViJeJLucbJXALELaekEwd5iBHxLBOfCbei9Ag5i8acUrRcYm70o6azts8JMZ2eC8xR1Y0C-Yh6K-OdntO6PZPf9LFxdu-Hqos8t8WLyOn3GPVdjR8sa0iv&csui=3):** Reviewing what went well and what could be improved (lessons learned).
- **[Releasing Resources](https://www.google.com/search?q=Releasing+Resources&sca_esv=254a162cfe8c6052&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4euy5gmmnXy3sOMyKB4llUSlim4g%3A1774317594008&ei=GvDBaa8Sy56x4w-3xe35BQ&ved=2ahUKEwiY1vSkuLeTAxXlVmwGHZ6XI0sQgK4QegQIERAF&uact=5&oq=what+are+the+activities+performed+in+Project+management+life+cycle+in+software+project+management+&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfD79VEJjq7g80dwdN1xRYU8RXPYR67lwCWhMG9QRvufSM0wmu4gUZIGr5fKpZHvMsx4pL3josdRQ-NzpIC8pu10c9qmlT8F4kMXsNAhrPlvJIxO_3eG_XAqRjJ870gh8bUkdjn8H6DIIgpD566Pas4nA6DGyS61pMViJeJLucbJXALELaekEwd5iBHxLBOfCbei9Ag5i8acUrRcYm70o6azts8JMZ2eC8xR1Y0C-Yh6K-OdntO6PZPf9LFxdu-Hqos8t8WLyOn3GPVdjR8sa0iv&csui=3):** Releasing team members and resources.
- **[Archiving Documents](https://www.google.com/search?q=Archiving+Documents&sca_esv=254a162cfe8c6052&biw=1536&bih=702&sxsrf=ANbL-n4euy5gmmnXy3sOMyKB4llUSlim4g%3A1774317594008&ei=GvDBaa8Sy56x4w-3xe35BQ&ved=2ahUKEwiY1vSkuLeTAxXlVmwGHZ6XI0sQgK4QegQIERAH&uact=5&oq=what+are+the+activities+performed+in+Project+management+life+cycle+in+software+project+management+&gs_&sclient=gws-wiz-serp&mstk=AUtExfD79VEJjq7g80dwdN1xRYU8RXPYR67lwCWhMG9QRvufSM0wmu4gUZIGr5fKpZHvMsx4pL3josdRQ-NzpIC8pu10c9qmlT8F4kMXsNAhrPlvJIxO_3eG_XAqRjJ870gh8bUkdjn8H6DIIgpD566Pas4nA6DGyS61pMViJeJLucbJXALELaekEwd5iBHxLBOfCbei9Ag5i8acUrRcYm70o6azts8JMZ2eC8xR1Y0C-Yh6K-OdntO6PZPf9LFxdu-Hqos8t8WLyOn3GPVdjR8sa0iv&csui=3):** Saving project documentation for future
